    ELSE CASE [a].[TipoCarga]
        WHEN 0 THEN N'Indefinido'
        WHEN 1 THEN N'Milho'
        WHEN 2 THEN N'SojaCrua'
        WHEN 3 THEN N'FareloDeSoja'
        WHEN 4 THEN N'Trigo'
        WHEN 5 THEN N'Arroz'
        WHEN 6 THEN N'Sorgo'
        WHEN 10 THEN N'Fosfato'
        WHEN 11 THEN N'Calcário'
        WHEN 12 THEN N'Potássio'
        WHEN 13 THEN N'Ureia'
        WHEN 14 THEN N'NPK'
        WHEN 20 THEN N'Sal'
        WHEN 21 THEN N'SalMineral'
        WHEN 22 THEN N'RacaoBovina'
        WHEN 23 THEN N'RacaoSuina'
        WHEN 24 THEN N'RacaoAves'
        WHEN 30 THEN N'Açucar'
        WHEN 31 THEN N'Algodao'
        WHEN 32 THEN N'Café'
        WHEN 33 THEN N'CanaDeAcucar'
        WHEN 99 THEN N'Outro'
        ELSE CAST([a].[TipoCarga] AS nvarchar(max))
    END
END AS [Produto], COALESCE([n0].[PesoBruto], [a].[VolumeCarga], 0.0) AS [PesoCarga], COALESCE([a].[PlacaVeiculo], [n0].[PlacaVeiculo]) AS [PlacaVeiculo], [u1].[Localizacao] AS [UnidadeEntrega], CASE [a].[StatusAgendamento]
    WHEN 0 THEN N'Disponivel'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Pendente'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Agendado'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'EmAndamento'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Finalizado'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Cancelado'
    ELSE CAST([a].[StatusAgendamento] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Status], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[UpdatedAt], [a].[DeletedAt]
FROM [Agendamento] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [f].[Id], [f].[Nome]

) AS [g0] ON [a].[GradeId] = [g0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (

    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [p].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [p0] ON [g0].[ProdutoId] = [p0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [n].[Id], [n].[PesoBruto], [n].[PlacaVeiculo]
    FROM [NotaFiscal] AS [n]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [n].[EmpresaId] = @__ef_filter__EmpresaId_0
) AS [n0] ON [a].[NotaFiscalId] = [n0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
